input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.7.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.7.1.1
            TITLE: an individual team member may not drive in more than three events.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.7.1.1: An individual team member may not drive in more than three events.
D.7.1.1 An individual team member may not drive in more than three events.

final_answer: An individual team member may not drive in more than three events.
